===On hand===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Lilligant
|gender=female
|type1=Grass
|img=Lusamine Lilligant.png
|epnum=SM053
|epname=Rescuing the Unwilling!
|vaen=Michele Knotz
|desc={{p|Lilligant}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. She has owned her since {{an|Gladion}} and {{an|Lillie}} were young. She first made cameo appearances in a photograph in ''[[SM008|Lillie's Egg-xhilarating Challenge!]]'' and ''[[SM027|A Glaring Rivalry!]]'', alongside Lusamine, Lusamine's {{p|Lillipup}} and {{p|Cleffa}} and a young Lillie and Gladion.

She first made her physical appearance while under Nihilego's control in ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', where Lusamine sent her out to battle against {{an|Lana}}, {{an|Mallow}}, {{an|Sophocles}}, their Pokémon, and {{Ash}}'s {{AP|Rowlet}} and {{AP|Litten}}. She was defeated by Litten's {{m|Fire Fang}} in ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', but Nihilego made her get back up and continue battling. Lilligant was freed from Nihilego's influence upon the Ultra Beast's defeat.

Lilligant's known moves are {{m|Petal Dance}}, {{m|Teeter Dance}}, {{m|Sweet Scent}}, and {{m|Solar Beam}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Salazzle
|gender=female
|type1=Poison
|type2=Fire
|img=Lusamine Salazzle.png
|epnum=SM053
|epname=Rescuing the Unwilling!
|vaen=Haven Paschall
|desc={{p|Salazzle}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. She first appeared under Nihilego's control in ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', where Lusamine sent her out to battle against {{an|Kiawe}}, his {{TP|Kiawe|Turtonator}}, and his {{TP|Kiawe|Marowak}}. She was eventually defeated by a combination of Turtonator's {{m|Inferno Overdrive}} and Marowak's {{m|Bonemerang}}. In ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', however, Nihilego made her get back up and continue battling until the Ultra Beast was defeated, freeing her from its control.

None of Salazzle's moves are known.<!--Salazzle's only known move is {{m|Sludge Wave}}.--><!--Do NOT assume the moves. Only add them if they have been EXPLICITLY said.-->}}

It was defeated by a combination of {{TP|Sophocles|Togedemaru}}'s {{m|Zing Zap}} and {{TP|Sophocles|Charjabug}}'s {{m|Discharge}} in ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', but Nihilego made it get back up and continue battling. Milotic was freed from Nihilego's influence upon the Ultra Beast's defeat.

Milotic's known moves are {{m|Hydro Pump}} and {{m|Aqua Tail}}.}}

It was defeated by {{TP|Lana|Popplio}}'s {{m|Hydro Vortex}} in ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', but Nihilego made it get back up and continue battling. Mismagius was freed from Nihilego's influence upon the Ultra Beast's defeat.

Mismagius's only known move is {{m|Thunderbolt}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Absol
|type1=Dark
|img=Lusamine Absol.png
|epnum=SM053
|epname=Rescuing the Unwilling!
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Absol}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. It has history with {{an|Gladion}}, and used to be a sparring partner for his {{p|Umbreon}}. It first appeared while under Lusamine's control in ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', where Lusamine sent it out to battle against Gladion, his {{p|Silvally}}, {{p|Lycanroc}}, and Umbreon. It was defeated by Lycanroc's {{m|Continental Crush}} in ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', but Nihilego made it get back up and continue battling. Absol was freed from Nihilego's influence upon the Ultra Beast's defeat, recognizing and happily reuniting with Umbreon.

Absol's known moves are {{m|Psycho Cut}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, and {{m|Mean Look}}.}}
